headline: Cross-cultural connector | Experienced sales expert who goes the extra mile

experiences.title: Commercial Manager (EMEA)
experiences.description:
AllUnite is a global advertising technology platform that enables advertising companies and media agencies to effectively measure, forecast, and target audiences in real-time.

AllUnite is a turn-key adtech solution for audience measurement out-of-home (OOH): in stores, cinemas, airports, shopping centres, railway stations, or many more.

experiences.title: Freelance
experiences.description: Sales and cross-cultural expert. Committed to holistic engagement and empowering start-ups and SMB businesses.

recommendations:
Alex Tallon

I had the pleasure of working alongside Rafe when I joined Rodeo as a Sales Development Representative. As the Account Executive for the UK team, Rafe was an invaluable resource for me, providing great advice and support as I got started.Over time, I saw Rafe's dedication and hard work pay off as he was promoted to UK Sales Manager. In this role, he has continued to impress, demonstrating his exceptional leadership skills and his ability to bring out the best in his team.Rafe is a true team player, and he always makes an effort to support and encourage his colleagues. He is an excellent communicator and is always willing to listen and provide guidance when needed.On a personal level, Rafe is a pleasure to know. He is a social and outgoing individual who is always up for a good conversation. His positive attitude and friendly demeanour make him a valuable asset to any team.Overall, I would highly recommend Rafe for any role related to sales or team leadership. He is a dedicated, hardworking, and personable individual who consistently goes above and beyond to achieve success.

Nathan Vissers

Rafe is an exceptional leader who has made a significant impact on our sales team and our overall business.Throughout our time working together, I have been impressed with Rafe's ability to motivate and support our sales team to achieve exceptional results. Rafe has a natural talent for identifying each team member's strengths and leveraging them to maximize their potential. His coaching and guidance have been instrumental in helping our team surpass our sales goals quarter after quarter.Rafe is an excellent communicator who fosters open dialogue and collaboration within the team. He has a unique ability to lead by example and has always been willing to lend a hand to any team member who needs it. Rafe's positive attitude and dedication to his work have had a significant impact on our team's morale and overall performance.In addition to Rafe's leadership skills, he also possesses a deep understanding of our industry and our clients' needs. His insights and strategic thinking have been instrumental in developing new business opportunities and growing our existing accounts.
